name: pr_nl_g6_two_groups
drl:
rule "R1"
salience -5
when
    $p1_0 : T2()
then
    delete($p1_0);
end
rule "R3"
when
    T1()
    $p3_1 : T2()
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
end
rule "R3b"
when
    T1()
    $p3_1 : T2()
then
    drools.setFocus("gc");
end
rule "R4"
salience($b4_1_0 - 1)
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T1()
    $p4_1 : T2($b4_1_0 : f0, $b4_1_1 : f3)
then
    insertLogical(new T3(false, 3.0, $b4_1_1));
end
rule "R4b"
salience($b4_1_0 - 1)
agenda-group "gc"
when
    T1()
    $p4_1 : T2($b4_1_0 : f0, $b4_1_1 : f3)
then
    insertLogical(new T3(false, 7.0, $b4_1_1));
end
rule "R5"
salience -10
when
    T1()
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
end
